title: Simple Lore
description: Allows to change an item description in survival mode
body:
# Features
Want to add some lore to your survival world? With Simple Lore datapack it only takes a few simple steps:

![Screenshot of a hotbar with an anvil, a grindstone, some sheets of paper and a mace (represents your favourite item)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd20c2696e7bbb22cfcfc179ca9586782ba179e4.png)

**Adding lore**
- drop an item on an anvil
- drop a renamed paper on the anvil
- right click on the anvil

The paper name will be added as a line to the item lore. You can use several sheets to create a truly huge text! As long as it fits on your screen.

**Removing lore**
- drop an item on a grindstone
- right click on the grindstone

All lines will be removed.

> On versions below 1.20.5 you don't need to right-click on blocks, lore will be added or removed automatically.

Your lore will look like this:

![The mace tooltip with three purple lines of lore.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/omNjQVNN/images/36badbcf3e5bccabded504d3c9e27180787c5033.png)

## Additional information
The datapack uses [Version Detector by AndrewGaming587](https://modrinth.com/project/4eWTQJSV). You can download Version Detector and Simple Lore separately (recommended) or, if you're feeling lazy, Simple Lore with built-in Detector as a single datapack.

Without Version Detector, Simple Lore may not work on versions below 1.21 and may work incorrectly on 1.21+
